basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer, Associate Project Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.post_name: Project Engineer, Associate Project Engineer and More
basic_details.notification_number: IITG/II&SI/Project Engineer, Associate Project Engineer and More Rectt-2026/121
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Engineer, Associate Project Engineer and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Engineer, Associate Project Engineer and More Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MTech Degree (Structural Engineering) with 6 years of experience in relevant works, B.Tech (Civil Engineering) with 6 years of experience in relevant field of works, B.Tech (Civil Engineering) with 3 years of experience in relevant field of works
qualification.details: Sr. Project Engineer: MTech Degree (Structural Engineering) with 6 years of experience in relevant works. Project Engineer: B.Tech (Civil Engineering) with 6 years of experience in relevant field of works. Associate Project Engineer: B.Tech (Civil Engineering) with 3 years of experience in relevant field of works.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Guwahati Project Staff positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Project Staff positions at IIT Guwahati. These are distributed across different roles like Sr. Project Engineer, Project Engineer, and Associate Project Engineer.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications range from a B.Tech in Civil Engineering with 3 or 6 years of experience to an M.Tech in Structural Engineering with 6 years of experience, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for IIT Guwahati Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post. Sr. Project Engineers can expect Rs. 75,000, Project Engineers Rs. 65,500, and Associate Project Engineers Rs. 49,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Staff positions at IIT Guwahati will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted for the interview based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed duration as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located at the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Assam apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. However, for definitive eligibility regarding domicile, please refer to the official notification PDF.
